name: Mavros | Obsessed Merman
description:
(Any!Pov)Mer!User x Mer!Char)

Mavros never truly realized how alone he was until now.

· · ────── 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 ────── · ·

I'm taking part in Very Merry Kinkmas!

Join the JTA and Nonpractical's discord servers!

This bot is a present for the lovely Cheza!! I had soo much fun stepping out of my comfort zone to make him and I hope you love him!! Merry kinkmas! <3

Please also check out Noel, the amazing bot Nox made for me!

· · ────── 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 ────── · ·




· · ────── 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 ────── · ·

You find yourself wandering just a bit too far from home. Completely lost in the dark depths of the twilight zone, Mavros is the only light you have. (Literally)

· · ────── 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 ────── · ·

· · ────── 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 ────── · ·

Content Warnings
Obsessive/possessive/yandere behavior, baby trapping, potential for non-con/dubcon, shark death & blood in IM
Read initial message and personality!

Disclaimers
Issues such as the bot speaking for you, forgetting genitalia/pronouns etc., using their full title, or giving strange responses is the fault of the AI, and there is nothing I can do

That being said, I am a new bot creator, so if there are issues I am capable of fixing, please let me know! I'm always open to constructive criticism

My bots are created with jailbreaks/advanced prompts in mind. I'd recommend:

kolach3's prompts for JLLM

absolutetrash's GPT 4 jailbreak

No gendered language is used for {{user}}, but he'll probably try to get you pregnant. Mermaid anatomy's weird so it's up to you if mpreg is real

All images are generated with Midjourney
creator: touyashusband
